content: 查询水质低于Ⅳ类的站点。
我来查询水质低于Ⅳ类（即Ⅴ类或劣Ⅴ类）的站点。

function.name: execute_code
function.arguments:
{"code":"import pymysql

conn = pymysql.connect(
    host='192.168.100.103', port=3306, user='root',
    password='<SL323_DB_PASSWORD>', database='sl323', charset='utf8mb4',
    connect_timeout=30, read_timeout=30
)

# 先查看水质站有哪些，以及最新采样时间
with conn.cursor(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor) as cur:
    cur.execute("""
        SELECT stcd, MAX(spt) as latest_spt 
        FROM sl325.wq_pcp_d 
        GROUP BY stcd 
        ORDER BY latest_spt DESC 
        LIMIT 20
    """)
    recent = cur.fetchall()

print("=== 各水质站最新采样时间 ===")
for r in recent:
    print(f"  {r['stcd']}: {r['latest_spt']}")

conn.close()"}

function.name: execute_code
function.arguments:
{"code":"import pymysql

conn = pymysql.connect(
    host='192.168.100.103', port=3306, user='root',
    password='<SL323_DB_PASSWORD>', database='sl323', charset='utf8mb4',
    connect_timeout=30, read_timeout=30
)

# 查询每个站点的最新水质数据，判断是否低于Ⅳ类
# Ⅳ类阈值: CODMn <= 10, DO >= 3, NH3N <= 1.5, TP <= 0.3
# 低于Ⅳ类 = 任一指标超标
sql = """
WITH latest AS (
    SELECT stcd, spt, dox, codmn, nh3n, tp
    FROM sl325.wq_pcp_d w
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT stcd, MAX(spt) as max_spt
        FROM sl325.wq_pcp_d
        GROUP BY stcd
    ) mx ON w.stcd = mx.stcd AND w.spt = mx.max_spt
    WHERE dox IS NOT NULL OR codmn IS NOT NULL OR nh3n IS NOT NULL OR tp IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    stcd, spt,
    dox, codmn, nh3n, tp,
    CASE 
        WHEN codmn > 15 OR dox < 2 OR nh3n > 30 OR tp > 0.4 THEN '劣V类'
        WHEN codmn > 10 OR dox < 3 OR nh3n > 2.0 OR tp > 0.3 THEN 'V类'
        WHEN codmn > 6 OR dox < 5 OR nh3n > 1.5 OR tp > 0.2 THEN 'IV类'
        WHEN codmn > 2 OR dox < 6 OR nh3n > 0.5 OR tp > 0.1 THEN 'III类'
        WHEN codmn > 1 OR dox < 5 THEN 'II类'
        ELSE 'I-II类'
    END as quality_level,
    -- 标记哪些指标超标(Ⅳ类线)
    CONCAT(
        CASE WHEN codmn > 10 THEN 'CODMn ' ELSE '' END,
        CASE WHEN dox < 3 THEN 'DO ' ELSE '' END,
        CASE WHEN nh3n > 1.5 THEN 'NH3N ' ELSE '' END,
        CASE WHEN tp > 0.3 THEN 'TP ' ELSE '' END
    ) as exceeded_items
FROM latest
WHERE codmn > 10 OR dox < 3 OR nh3n > 1.5 OR tp > 0.3
ORDER BY spt DESC
"""

with conn.cursor(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor) as cur:
    cur.execute(sql)
    results = cur.fetchall()

print(f"=== 水质低于Ⅳ类的站点 (共 {len(results)} 个) ===\n")
if not results:
    print("当前无低于Ⅳ类的站点。")
else:
    for r in results:
        exceeded = r['exceeded_items'].strip() if r['exceeded_items'] else ''
        print(f"站点: {r['stcd']}")
        print(f"  采样时间: {r['spt']}")
        print(f"  评级: {r['quality_level']}")
        print(f"  CODMn: {r['codmn']} | DO: {r['dox']} | NH3N: {r['nh3n']} | TP: {r['tp']}")
        print(f"  超标指标: {exceeded if exceeded else '无'}")
        print()

conn.close()"}

MySQL 版本不支持 CTE，改用子查询方式。

function.name: execute_code
function.arguments:
{"code":"import pymysql

conn = pymysql.connect(
    host='192.168.100.103', port=3306, user='root',
    password='<SL323_DB_PASSWORD>', database='sl323', charset='utf8mb4',
    connect_timeout=30, read_timeout=30
)

# MySQL 5.7 不支持 CTE，改用子查询
sql = """
SELECT 
    w.stcd, w.spt,
    w.dox, w.codmn, w.nh3n, w.tp,
    CASE 
        WHEN w.codmn > 15 OR w.dox < 2 OR w.nh3n > 30 OR w.tp > 0.4 THEN '劣V类'
        WHEN w.codmn > 10 OR w.dox < 3 OR w.nh3n > 2.0 OR w.tp > 0.3 THEN 'V类'
        WHEN w.codmn > 6 OR w.dox < 5 OR w.nh3n > 1.5 OR w.tp > 0.2 THEN 'IV类'
        WHEN w.codmn > 2 OR w.dox < 6 OR w.nh3n > 0.5 OR w.tp > 0.1 THEN 'III类'
        WHEN w.codmn > 1 OR w.dox < 5 THEN 'II类'
        ELSE 'I-II类'
    END as quality_level,
    CONCAT(
        CASE WHEN w.codmn > 10 THEN 'CODMn ' ELSE '' END,
        CASE WHEN w.dox < 3 THEN 'DO ' ELSE '' END,
        CASE WHEN w.nh3n > 1.5 THEN 'NH3N ' ELSE '' END,
        CASE WHEN w.tp > 0.3 THEN 'TP ' ELSE '' END
    ) as exceeded_items
FROM sl325.wq_pcp_d w
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT stcd, MAX(spt) as max_spt
    FROM sl325.wq_pcp_d
    GROUP BY stcd
) mx ON w.stcd = mx.stcd AND w.spt = mx.max_spt
WHERE (w.codmn IS NOT NULL AND w.codmn > 10)
   OR (w.dox IS NOT NULL AND w.dox < 3)
   OR (w.nh3n IS NOT NULL AND w.nh3n > 1.5)
   OR (w.tp IS NOT NULL AND w.tp > 0.3)
ORDER BY w.spt DESC
"""

with conn.cursor(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor) as cur:
    cur.execute(sql)
    results = cur.fetchall()

print(f"=== 水质低于Ⅳ类的站点（共 {len(results)} 个）==\n")
if not results:
    print("当前无低于Ⅳ类的站点。")
else:
    for r in results:
        exceeded = r['exceeded_items'].strip() if r['exceeded_items'] else ''
        print(f"📍 站点: {r['stcd']}")
        print(f"   采样时间: {r['spt']}")
        print(f"   评级: {r['quality_level']}")
        print(f"   CODMn: {r['codmn']} | DO: {r['dox']} | NH3N: {r['nh3n']} | TP: {r['tp']}")
        print(f"   超标指标(超Ⅳ类线): {exceeded if exceeded else '无'}")
        print()

conn.close()"}

现在查一下测站名称，让结果更易读：

function.name: execute_code
function.arguments:
{"code":"import pymysql

conn = pymysql.connect(
    host='192.168.100.103', port=3306, user='root',
    password='<SL323_DB_PASSWORD>', database='sl323', charset='utf8mb4',
    connect_timeout=30, read_timeout=30
)

# 获取测站名称
stcds = [
    'HT0051003103000018', 'HT0051002002000016', 'HT0021003103000026',
    'QLH000000001', 'MN20230425662', 'YZGL2022008', 'MN20230402599',
    'YZGL2022004', '32102311000852', 'wanyi123', 'YZXYH000000001',
    'YZYZH000000001', 'HJDBSXM2021008', 'HJDBSXM2020001'
]

sql = "SELECT STCD, STNM, STTP FROM sl323.st_stbprp_b WHERE STCD = %s"
station_names = {}
with conn.cursor(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor) as cur:
    for s in stcds:
        cur.execute(sql, (s,))
        r = cur.fetchone()
        if r:
            station_names[s] = (r['STNM'], r['STTP'])

conn.close()

# 预警数据
alerts = [
    ('HT0051003103000018', '2026-03-31 18:00', 'V类', 'CODMn:10.1', 'CODMn'),
    ('HT0051002002000016', '2026-03-31 17:30', '劣V类', 'DO:0.4', 'DO'),
    ('HT0021003103000026', '2026-03-31 16:55', 'V类', 'TP:0.36', 'TP'),
    ('QLH000000001', '2026-03-31 12:00', '劣V类', 'NH3N:8.0, TP:8.0', 'NH3N, TP'),
    ('MN20230425662', '2026-03-31 12:00', 'V类', 'CODMn:10.5', 'CODMn'),
    ('YZGL2022008', '2026-03-31 12:00', '劣V类', 'DO:0.3', 'DO'),
    ('MN20230402599', '2026-03-31 12:00', '劣V类', 'DO:0.0', 'DO'),
    ('YZGL2022004', '2026-03-31 08:00', 'V类', 'DO:2.7', 'DO'),
    ('32102311000852', '2026-03-31 08:00', 'V类', 'NH3N:2.94', 'NH3N'),
    ('wanyi123', '2026-03-27 12:00', '劣V类', 'DO:1.0', 'DO'),
    ('YZXYH000000001', '2025-12-27 12:00', '劣V类', 'NH3N:8.0, TP:8.0', 'NH3N, TP'),
    ('YZYZH000000001', '2025-12-27 12:00', '劣V类', 'TP:1.71', 'TP'),
    ('HJDBSXM2021008', '2024-11-10 16:00', 'V类', 'DO:2.6', 'DO'),
    ('HJDBSXM2020001', '2024-11-10 16:00', 'V类', 'CODMn:10.7', 'CODMn'),
]

print("=" * 80)
print("水质预警 — 低于Ⅳ类站点汇总（按严重程度排序）")
print("=" * 80)
print(f"{'站号':<20} {'站名':<18} {'采样时间':<16} {'等级':<6} {'超标指标'}")
print("-" * 80)

# 先打印劣V类，再打印V类
diao = [a for a in alerts if a[2] == '劣V类']
v = [a for a in alerts if a[2] == 'V类']

for a in diao + v:
    stcd, spt, level, values, exceeded = a
    name = ''
    if stcd in station_names:
        name = station_names[stcd][0]
    print(f"  {stcd:<20} {name:<18} {spt:<16} {level:<6} ⚠ {exceeded} ({values})")

print()
print(f"总计: {len(alerts)} 个站点低于Ⅳ类")
print(f"  劣V类: {len(diao)} 个 | V类: {len(v)} 个")
print()
print("📌 超标指标统计:")
from collections import Counter
exceeded_counter = Counter()
for a in alerts:
    for item in a[4].split(', '):
        exceeded_counter[item.strip()] += 1
for item, count in exceeded_counter.most_common():
    print(f"  {item}: {count} 个站点")"}
